name: HRG_GOAL_PLN_ASSIGNMENTS
description: Stores goal plan assignment details (mapping of goal plan and assignments).

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOAL_PLANS_B, which holds ID of goal plan.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M, which holds assignment of worker

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id of the person to whom the goal plan is assigned to.

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Review period Id of the goal plan assignment

columns.Name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.Comments: Reference to the organization to which goal plan is being created.

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_SET_ID
columns.Comments: Unique id for goal plan set.

columns.Name: WEIGHTING
columns.Comments: Goal Plan weight assigned

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan Start Date

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan End Date

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_SET_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan Set Start Date

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_SET_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Goal Plan Set End Data

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Staus for Goal Plan assignment record

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores request status of the last ESS job submitted for this assignment record
